column14: Sticky, sweet caramel gel. Kinda like a drink.
HUGE in size. Picture bits of green apple jello in juice. Very easy to drink. Sweet af. Given the size, can't store that many in your vest.
Dana is right - these are refreshing. They're not sickly sweet, more light and airy. Almost feels like one of those powdered European delights.
Strawberry salt water. Like the 6d. Passion fruit flavor is INCREDIBLE.
